channel.title: +Svembu on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Svembu on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Climate change & India dev
item.description: (Source: https://threader.app/thread/1436123028660707331) What should be India’s development trajectory? This question is all important and assumes urgency in light of global climate change. We have so far treated development and economic growth as a separate topic from climate change. Yet this dualism cannot provide us answers. I will make an important assumption: the present per capita energy consumption of America is not remotely feasible for India, even if the entire energy were to come from renewable sources.

item.title: India - policy freedom
item.description: Source: TW An important part of woke indoctrination in elite universities as it pertains to India is to understand that India’s very existence poses a challenge to the Marxist/materialist world-view that sees itself as the One True Way. India is a weird pagan relic in this view. As long as India stayed poor - first due to colonialism and later due to socialism - it was only a charity case (“basket case”), to be rescued with money and evangelism.
